run_summary.summary: One new find this run: Whisker (Litter-Robot 5 Pro) — Kenny sent the invoice on Apr 24 and Liz confirmed ACH as her payment preference with Cheyenne Mabey on Apr 27. If there's a Whisker deal card, it should be at Invoiced with payment expected via ACH (~May 24). Carrying forward four items from the previous run that appear still pending: Wise Block (URGENT — Apr 30 Botanical Series deadline is now 2 days away, Iris has followed up 5+ times and is still waiting on a rate quote), Shabebe and Black Diamond Coatings (both outbound pitches sent Apr 27, follow-ups due Apr 30), and the JLab Tipalti onboarding note (portal set up Apr 27, invoices go to apinvoice@jlab.com).

suggestions.message: Apr 30 deadline is 2 days away and Iris has now followed up 5+ times with no reply. If there's any interest in the Botanical Series collab, a rate quote needs to go out today. If not, a quick 'not the right fit right now' keeps the door open with Make Wonder INC for future opportunities.

Litter-Robot 5 Pro collab is wrapping up cleanly — content posted, invoice out Apr 24, and Liz confirmed ACH as payment method with Cheyenne on Apr 27. Payment should arrive around May 24 (30-day window). Kenny already sent a warm note about wanting to work together again, which is great relationship maintenance.
Liz pitched the backyard firepit patio collab (featuring Rock Glue) on Apr 27. No reply yet — follow up Apr 30 if still silent.
Same firepit concept pitched to Lauren Jankauskas on Apr 27 (featuring Mulch Glue). No reply yet — follow up Apr 30 if still silent.
Tipalti payment portal setup confirmed Apr 27 — Liz's banking details are in. Submit invoices to apinvoice@jlab.com (pdf, jpg, or png only). Portal: suppliers.tipalti.com/jlab/Account/Login

deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz confirmed ACH as payment preference to Cheyenne Mabey (cmabey@whisker.com). Kenny sent invoice Apr 24. Payment will arrive via ACH.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: Liz confirmed ACH payment method with Cheyenne — invoice out Apr 24, awaiting payment

deals.notes: [Apr 27]: JLab accounting team (ap@jlabaudio.com) sent Tipalti payment portal invitation. Liz completed registration same day — account created successfully and payment/banking details added (confirmed by payment change notification). Invoice submission: apinvoice@jlab.com (pdf, jpg, or png only). Portal login: suppliers.tipalti.com/jlab/Account/Login
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: JLab onboarded Liz to Tipalti payment portal — account created and payment details confirmed

deals.next_action: Reply to Iris with rate quote — launch window closes Apr 30
deals.notes:
[Apr 28]: Iris followed up again asking for Liz's rate quote for the Wise Block Botanical Series. Launch window closes Apr 30.
[Apr 23]: Original outreach from Iris at Make Wonder INC (official Wise Block partner agency under Alpha Group). Offering cash compensation (competitive collaboration fee) + 1 free building block set + Key Partner status for 1 YouTube/Instagram Video. Botanical Series = Eastern-themed building block sets (Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony). Sample delivery: 3–5 days after confirmation. Launch deadline: before April 25–30.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Lauren if no response by Apr 30
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz sent outbound pitch to Lauren at Shabebe proposing a backyard firepit patio makeover collab. Concept: raised patio with large pavers + pea gravel, showcasing Shabebe's Rock Glue and hardscape products for a DIY family-friendly outdoor space. Liz attached media kit and CC'd Kenny.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Lauren Jankauskas if no response by Apr 30
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz sent outbound pitch to Lauren Jankauskas at Black Diamond Coatings proposing a backyard firepit patio makeover collab. Same DIY patio project concept as Shabebe pitch, featuring their Mulch Glue and hardscape products. Liz attached media kit and CC'd Kenny.
